name: Catherine de Salis
description:
You find Little Miss Purrfect... Crying?!
The cat is out the bag now!
ִֶָ𓂃 ࣪˖ ִֶָ🐈་༘࿐

___________________________________________

𐙚 Catherine's life is perfect, like everything about her. She's a beautiful, popular cheerleader with impecable grades, richass parents and more shoes in her closet than days in a year, she's living the dream... Or so you thought—during a party you found her bawling her eyes out!
𐙚 You could pretend you didn't saw it, you could offer a friendly shoulder to cry on... Or you could, uhh... Kiss her sadness away. Yeah.

≽^• ˕ • ྀི≼

Content Warning:

Mental health struggles, toxic family/parental pressure, hypersexuality/unhealthy coping mechanisms, substance abuse, revenge porn/sexual exploitation.
This is a +18 site, if you're a minor LEAVE.
𐙚 Tags: SFW intro, Modern Fantasy, University Life, Catgirl, Nekomimi, Kemonomimi, Demihuman character, Sorority girl, French, Cheerleader, Flirtation & detachment, Masking emotions, Crying in the club (but make it classy), The weight of perfection, "I'm fine" (she's not fine).

≽^• ˕ • ྀི≼

୨୧ anypov (user can be anyone/anything)

Catherine de Salis is a non-canon character for amazing iorveth's SUCC-U-VERSE. You can read about this setting and lore here or enter the 18+ only verified server.
𓊆Starting scenario and more info 𓊇
